flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Marshalltown Community College fell 31% between 2006 and 2009 (37.4% → 25.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marshalltown Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Marshalltown Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Marshalltown Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (56.8% → 68.7%).
